review_title: Great product - but the service is THE BEST
description: Service from the feed support team is awesome
author: Dave W.
pros: The integration with marketplaces is easy. Service level for feed support is top notch. 24 hours a day, globally covered team supports like no other software. Top notch!
cons: Should be able to add marketplaces on a reduced price sliding scale

review_title: Friendly, reliable and capable service at a very reasonable cost
description: Overall a very positive experience; friendly team of people, prompt replies and clearly know what they're doing.
author: Sarfraz K.
pros: Able to incorporate our rather less sophisticated systems, always able to find a solution to our issues (or at least make the path as easy as possible).
cons: None, all issues were internal! Perhaps as we use it more I may be able to provide more here.

author: Alan M.
pros: Feedonomics have removed the day to day pain in managing feeds, trouble shooting and fixing issues and we've seen our disapproval rates drop to circa 2% across all regions as opposed to 25/30% prior to working with them.
cons: No complaints so far in the service or technology provided.

description: My overall experience with Feedonimics has been absolutely fantastic. There has never been a time when Feedonomics hasn't been able to accommodate my needs.
author: Jeffery W.
pros: What I like most about the Feedonomics Software is that it is easy to learn which makes training new hires easy and you can alter almost any data. Feedonomics is above most when it comes to data segmenting/optimizing.
cons: There really isn't anything that immediately comes to my mind when it comes to cons of using Feedonomics, however, if I had to choose it would be my own lack of knowledge of some transformer functions. But, that can be easily learned.

review_title: Feedonomics helping e-Commerce brands manager ever changing product feeds for success
description: Feedoomics has been indispensable in helping us to manage sprawling product feeds across varying platforms.
author: Ken W.
pros: Feedonomics makes it easy to manage a unified product catalog for omni channel brands. Great data synchronization with 2x daily feed imports to ensure that platforms are displaying the most current inventories, product information, and pricing on a rolling basis
cons: Must tiers of service are self serve with sometimes limited support from the platform. Recommend to get a tier with higher flexibility and support direct from Feedonomics

review_title: Its like hiring a full time employee to manage your online marketplaces
description: I'm extremely impressed with the team at feedonomics and how well they handle the onboarding process and the day to day feed management for all of our sales channels.
author: Adam M.
pros: It has freed up a large amount of time for my team. Tasks that used to eat up our schedule are now handled more efficiently by the team at feedonomics.
cons: The GUI is a bit complicated and difficult to navigate. However, it really hasn't ever been necessary for me to do so because their support is so good and immediately handle any issues that arise.

review_title: Good product for managing multiple channel feeds
description: This is a much easier way to syndicate our feeds across multiple channels and due to the size of our catalog, managing it in any manual way is not feasible.
author: Robbie S.
pros: each channel feeds customizability and ability to add rules for each individually
cons: The software has a steep learning curve and the tutorials are gated which seems like a cash grab vs helping new users fully use the software

review_title: Feature rich cataloging and product feed software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is ability to support multiple languages, it helped to us to go live with country specific languages especially in the European region.
cons: Little bit complicated to understand initially as it was heavily enriched with bunch of feature, once got the pace then no need to look back.

description: Overall our experience with feedonomics has been great and we really value the being able to offer this to our clients.
author: Molly W.
pros: The support is second to none. Any quiries/tickets are replied to within minutes and account managers are always more than happy to help whether it be with issues that have arisen or furthering your understanding and offering to your clients.
cons: The one area that would be really beneficial to our team and clients would be better reporting and auditing services in order to show the value of work we do with feedonomics and the benefits it brings.

description: Good, able to apply optimisations efficiently to product feed attributes, and create exports for multiple output channels
author: Louise S.
pros: functionality, organisation of rules, support, feedonomics academy, meta fields pulled through, multiple output feeds: Google
cons: The manual application of the rules. Unable to duplicate rules in an attribute, so have to manually add them in.

description: overall we really like using feedonomics and would recommend it to anyone in the ecommerce space
author: Jake N.
pros: The integration is easy to set up, and once done. Feedonomics help govern your feed so you don't need to be hands on
cons: Creating custom overlays within feed comes at an additional cost

author: Christopher T.
pros: Integration with our advertisers and our ecommerce backend was seamless.
cons: Could be cheaper but for what we get it's not that critical.

description: Allowed us to offer really high quality feed optimisation for our clients, who otherwise would not be able to get the same kind of results.
author: Rachel G.
pros: The extent to which you can customise the feed optimise. There is a lot of flexibility on the work you can do. Once you understand the software it is realtive easy to use and if there are issues, support is quickly available and offers solutions.
cons: The auditing software could be better, so we could more clearly see where improvements have been made. Also more easily see specific products which need further optimisation.

description: my overall experience with this was overwhelming at first - but once i learnt how to navigate around the platform and had used it afew times it got alot easier
author: Anwar B.
pros: The product is easy to use once you have got your head around the way it works, the interface is good and adding data in is easily done once you have learnt to navigate around the platform. Integration was reletively easy for us
cons: Creating custom labels could be improved - and how to find the data
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must for large product feeds
author: Ed L.
pros: Feedonomics is a must have for businesses with large product catalogs. If you're in the hundreds of thousands, it's a crucial data technology piece to help connect and manage all of your e-com channels.
cons: There's a bit of nickel and diming with specific channels like FB and Amazon but generally good overall value for what it does provide.

description: Easy integration and good feed management solution
author: Singh S.
pros: Simple to use and good customer support.
cons: Nothing specific to mention. Sound product

author: Verified Reviewer
cons: We use it for Google feeds. I can’t really think of any cons

author: Jake T.
pros: The integration with GMC and the ease of setting up data rules
cons: There isnt anything just yet that I dont like

review_title: Product feed management is managed well with feedonomics
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's ability to support multiple languages. Yes, with this we were able to make the product advertised across huge audience across Europe.
cons: Access and permissions configuration have scope to to improve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
